inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Initial amount of money borrowed or invested. Standard financial practice.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Yearly interest rate as a percentage. Common in loan and investment calculations.

inputs.label: Time Period
inputs.businessContext: Duration for which interest is calculated. Typically in years.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often interest is compounded. Affects total interest earned/paid.

inputs.label: Interest Type
inputs.businessContext: Simple interest is linear; compound interest grows exponentially.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Used for risk-adjusted outputs.

formulas.compoundingFactor: case compoundingFrequency when 'annually' then 1 when 'semi-annually' then 2 when 'quarterly' then 4 when 'monthly' then 12 when 'daily' then 365 end

breakdown.totalInterest: if interestType='simple' then simpleInterest else compoundInterest
breakdown.totalAmount: if interestType='simple' then totalAmountSimple else totalAmountCompound

hiddenLossDrivers: if annualInterestRate > 20 then 'High interest rate may indicate risk'
if timePeriod > 30 then 'Long duration may increase uncertainty'
suggestedActions: if interestType='simple' and timePeriod > 5 then 'Consider compound interest for better returns'
if annualInterestRate > 15 then 'Review loan terms or investment risk'
